backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor that handles user profiles (get/save with access control), booking form submissions (submit/list), and includes blob storage and authorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that Gallery.tsx was updated to render only a bare section shell with no visible content, mapped to test REQ-15.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary of short summaries for every frontend source file, describing each component's purpose and styling for the DJ Fizz website.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the DJ Fizz React app, mounting the app into a #root div and loading src/main.tsx as a module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining a root layout with Header/Footer and two routes: HomePage at / and AdminPage at /admin.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section displaying DJ Fizz's portrait photo with neon green glow border and two paragraphs of bio copy, styled with the DJ Fizz dark/neon brand.
frontend/src/components/AddOns.tsx: Premium add-ons section rendering five glass cards for lighting, audio, and projection services with neon green icons and a custom packages note.
frontend/src/components/BookingForm.tsx: Eight-field booking inquiry form that submits event details to the Motoko backend via useSubmitForm, with loading, success, and error states.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand logo, quick navigation links, contact info, social links, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Gallery.tsx: Placeholder gallery section component that renders an empty section element with the id 'gallery'.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed top navigation header with scroll-aware styling, desktop and mobile nav menus, smooth-scroll section links, and an admin route button.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section displaying a banner image with animated neon-green light beam overlays, a headline, subheadline, and CTA buttons for scrolling to sections.
frontend/src/components/MoreThanMusic.ts: Section highlighting DJ Fizz's event-professional qualities through a two-column layout with descriptive copy and four icon-based pillar cards covering timeline management, crowd reading, planner coordination, and transitions.
frontend/src/components/SEOSection.tsx: SEO-focused section emphasizing DJ Fizz's Raleigh, NC service area with keyword-rich copy, three feature badges, and a 'Check Availability' CTA button.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Displays a four-card grid of DJ Fizz's service offerings—weddings, corporate events, school dances, and private parties—each with an icon, description, and a booking scroll link.
frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx: Renders a testimonials section with five hardcoded client reviews displayed in a responsive grid, each showing star ratings, quote text, and event details with a neon-green glass-card style.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching all booking form submissions (useGetAllSubmissions) and submitting a new booking form (useSubmitForm) via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind with a dark neon-green theme via CSS variables, and defines custom utility classes for glow effects, glass cards, animations, and beam effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page that fetches and displays all booking form submissions as styled cards with event details, contact info, timestamps, and loading/error states.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Composes the public-facing home page by rendering all section components in order: Hero, About, Services, AddOns, MoreThanMusic, Gallery, Testimonials, SEOSection, and BookingForm.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom colors (neon green, djblack palette, semantic tokens), fonts, shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes for the DJ Fizz site.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot (version 25) describing the DJ Fizz website's architecture, color palette, implemented features, known issues, and build goals including booking form, admin page, and section layout.
